channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 18-year-old Macklin Celebrini scores a goal in his hyped debut for the Sharks
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Macklin Celebrini didn't take long to make an impact for the San Jose Sharks. The 18-year-old rookie scored San Jose's first goal of the season and added an assist in his first period as a pro Thursday night against the St.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx stun New York Liberty with 95-93 overtime win in Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Minnesota coach Cheryl Reeve has seen a lot in her incredible career that has included four WNBA championships. The historic rally by the Lynx to beat New York 95-93 in a wild Game 1 of the WNBA Finals ranks right up there as one of the best moments.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Adam Svensson has personal-best 60 to lead in Utah's return to PGA Tour after 61 years
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Adam Svensson made a 35-foot eagle putt he thought he had missed and closed with a birdie from the bunker for a career-best 11-under 60, giving him a two-shot lead Thursday in the Black Desert Championship as the PGA Tour returned to Utah for the first time in 61 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Guardians avoid elimination with late rally, force decisive Game 5 against Tigers
item.description: The American League Division Series is headed back to Cleveland after the Guardians rallied late to take Game 4 over the Detroit Tigers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer, squeeze bunt lead Guardians over Tigers 5-4 and force ALDS Game 5
item.description: Pinch-hitter David Fry had a go-ahead, two-run homer in the seventh inning, then bunted home an insurance run in the ninth to help the Cleveland Guardians force a decisive Game 5 against the Detroit Tigers in their AL Division Series with a 5-4 victory.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: WNBA to expand Finals to 7-game series next season
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The WNBA will expand its Finals next year to a best-of-seven format, the league announced Thursday. The league currently has a best-of-five semifinals and finals in its playoffs with a best-of-three first round.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Greek soccer player George Baldock found dead in Athens home; investigators rule out foul play
item.description: Reuters reported that police attempted to resuscitate George Baldock after his body was found at the home just outside of Athens, Greece.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rays say it may take 'weeks' to fully assess damage at Tropicana Field, after Milton struck region
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays said it may take weeks to fully assess how much damage was done to Tropicana Field, which saw its roof ripped to shreds by the force of Hurricane Milton as the deadly storm barreled across much of Florida. The team said no one was injured when the St.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Phillies fan suggests watching Mets' Francisco Lindor hit clutch grand slam was one of life's 'low points'
item.description: One Phillies fan seemed to take her favorite team's playoff exit to heart, saying watching the Mets knock out Philadelphia was one of her life's low points.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Heisman frontrunner Ashton Jeanty credits his faith for ‘ultimate transformation’: ‘My identity is in Christ’
item.description: Boise State running back Ashton Jeanty, the frontrunner for the Heisman Trophy, recently spoke about his faith and how he credits his relationship with God for his performance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Rafael Nadal gave his all until he simply couldn’t anymore and had to retire: Analysis
item.description: Rafael Nadal’s tennis career will be remembered because of the numbers, yes — the 14 French Open trophies, the 22 Grand Slam titles overall, the nearly two decades in the top 10, and so on — and, without a doubt, because of his riveting rivalries with Roger Federer and Novak Djokovic.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets interim Jeff Ulbrich replaces Nathaniel Hackett with Todd Downing as the offense's play caller
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Jeff Ulbrich shook up the New York Jets' struggling offense in his first major move as interim head coach. Ulbrich announced Thursday he replaced Nathaniel Hackett with Todd Downing as the offensive play caller.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Sox undergo massive coaching overhaul after disappointing 2024 season finish: report
item.description: The Boston Red Sox finished below expectations for the 2024 season, and a massive coaching overhaul has reportedly taken place as they look ahead to next year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sei Young Kim cards 10-under 62 to lead LPGA event in China after first round
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Sei Young Kim, looking for her first victory this season, opened with a 10-under 62 on Thursday to lead the first round of the Buick LPGA Shanghai tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz counting on Hendricks and George to take big strides
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With its commitment to a youth movement, the Utah Jazz are counting on Keyonte George and Taylor Hendricks to both take big strides in their second seasons this year. After playing in 75 games as a rookie, George wore down a bit at the end of the year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cal WBB player makes a splash with sneaker design
item.description: BERKELEY, Calif. (KRON) -- Hooper by day, artist by night. That's life for Cal Berkeley women's basketball player Jayda Noble. The senior guard has balanced her nonstop basketball schedule with her other passion -- sneaker design.
item.dc:creator: Jason Dumas, KRON4
